goals.objective: Create an operator runbook for one bounded production pilot run.
acceptance_criteria: Runbook starts with runtime readiness.
Runbook uses Integration Inbox, worker pool and learning closure.
Runbook has stop conditions for blocked readiness, capacity, checker and closure.
Runbook excludes auto-merge, deploy and automatic memory promotion.

goals.objective: Define the smallest metrics contract for pilot repeatability.
acceptance_criteria: Metrics link source, work item, goal, loop, leases and closure.
Metrics include success rate, time to closure, checker rejection rate, candidate counts and intervention count.
No new table is added unless existing metadata cannot hold the pilot id.

goals.objective: Execute or simulate-with-real-runtime one bounded low-risk pilot item and capture evidence.
acceptance_criteria: Run uses explicit real runtime or records readiness block.
Run links source event through learning closure or exact blocked reason.
Evidence is added to evidence.md.

goals.objective: Repeat the pilot on a second bounded low-risk item.
acceptance_criteria: Run is comparable with pilot 1.
Metrics can compute checker rejection and intervention deltas.
Evidence is added to evidence.md.

goals.objective: Repeat the pilot on a third bounded low-risk item.
acceptance_criteria: Run is comparable with pilots 1 and 2.
Metrics can compute three-run success rate.
Evidence is added to evidence.md.

goals.objective: Expose latest pilot chain and metrics in Mission Control if current payload is insufficient.
acceptance_criteria: Operator can identify latest pilot state and next safe action.
Partial and empty pilot states do not crash the dashboard.
No raw stdout reading is required for the demo.

goals.objective: Validate the OpenSpec change and focused gates.
acceptance_criteria: OpenSpec validates strict.
Goals batch previews successfully.
Focused tests pass for touched code.
type-check and git diff check pass.
